scripts.build: pnpm --filter @sift-review/core build && pnpm --filter @sift-review/claude-adapter build && pnpm --filter @sift-review/web build && pnpm --filter siftdiff build
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.health:cycles: pnpm --filter @sift-review/core build && madge --circular --extensions ts,tsx --ts-config tsconfig.base.json packages/core/src packages/claude-adapter/src packages/cli/src packages/web/src packages/eval/src
scripts.health:docs: pnpm --filter @sift-review/core build && pnpm --filter @sift-review/claude-adapter build && tsx scripts/docs-check.ts
scripts.health: pnpm health:readme && pnpm health:copy && pnpm health:hygiene && pnpm health:keymap && pnpm health:docs && pnpm health:knip && pnpm health:cycles && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm bundle:check
